channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Apple's Hide My Email feature has a bug that's been exposing real email addresses, researcher claims - TechCrunch
item.description:
1. Apple's Hide My Email feature has a bug that's been exposing real email addresses, researcher claims  TechCrunch
  2. Apple ‘Hide My Email’ Vulnerability Reveals Peoples’ Real Email Addresses  404 Media
  3. Apple's Hide My Email May Not Be Hiding Anything  Engadget
  4. Major Apple Bug Appears to Disclose All Real Emails for 'Hide My Email' Users  cnet.com
  5. Apple hasn't fixed a Hide My Email privacy bug in over a year  AppleInsider

item.title: Xbox reportedly to follow PlayStation's example and ditch discs for next-gen console Project Helix - Eurogamer.net
item.description:
1. Xbox reportedly to follow PlayStation's example and ditch discs for next-gen console Project Helix  Eurogamer.net
  2. Xbox testing disc-to-digital feature that digitizes a physical game collection  The Verge
  3. Xbox reportedly testing a way to digitize physical games in the wake of PlayStation killing game discs — feature said to go back to Xbox One-era games  Tom's Hardware
  4. Report: Xbox Disc-to-Digital Feature in Testing, Microsoft "Likely" to Stop Disc Production Too  Digital Foundry
  5. Xbox's New Console, Project Helix, Will Reportedly Not Have a Disc Drive  IGN

item.description:

  5. "I Do Not Claim To Be A Veteran Or An Expert" - We Spoke To The Person Supposedly Bringing 3DO Back From The Dead  Time Extension
